title: POI categories model (M2M catalog, replaces single `type` enum)

tasks.title: Add poi_categories dbschema
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/schemas/destination/poi-category.dbschema.ts: table poi_categories with id (uuid PK), slug (text UNIQUE NOT NULL), nameI18n (jsonb NOT NULL, $type<I18nText>()), translationMeta (jsonb NULL DEFAULT '{}', $type<TranslationMeta>()), icon (text NULL), displayWeight (integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 50), plus BaseModel lifecycle/audit columns (lifecycleState default ACTIVE, adminInfo, createdAt/By, updatedAt/By, deletedAt/By) and unique index on slug. Mirror destinations.nameI18n shape (data-driven, NOT i18n-by-slug). Spec §6.1. Tests: covered by T-004.

tasks.title: Add r_poi_category join dbschema with partial unique primary index
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/schemas/destination/r_poi_category.dbschema.ts mirroring r_destination_point_of_interest: columns pointOfInterestId (uuid FK -> points_of_interest.id ON DELETE CASCADE), categoryId (uuid FK -> poi_categories.id ON DELETE CASCADE), isPrimary (boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false). Composite PK (pointOfInterestId, categoryId). Indexes: composite (pointOfInterestId, categoryId) + standalone on categoryId. Single-primary invariant: partial uniqueIndex('r_poi_category_primary_idx').on(pointOfInterestId).where(sql`is_primary = true`) declared directly in the Drizzle table (Carril 1, no extras CHECK). Spec §6.2/§5. Tests: T-004, T-025.

subtasks.title: Create r_poi_category.dbschema.ts with composite PK + both FKs cascade
Partial unique index on pointOfInterestId WHERE is_primary = true

tasks.title: Generate structural migration (0053)
tasks.description: Run pnpm db:generate to produce the next sequential structural migration (0053 verified free vs origin/staging 2026-07-13; last is 0052 — RE-CHECK immediately before PR, a parallel PR may take it). Verify the generated SQL includes both CREATE TABLE statements, the FKs ON DELETE CASCADE, all indexes, and the partial unique index WHERE is_primary = true. Spec §7.1. Do NOT hand-edit; regenerate if wrong.

subtasks.title: Verify partial unique index present in SQL

tasks.title: Add/update dbschema structural tests
tasks.description: Create packages/db/test/schemas/destination/poi-category.dbschema.test.ts and r_poi_category.dbschema.test.ts mirroring point-of-interest.dbschema.test.ts: assert column set, types, NOT NULL, defaults, unique index on slug, composite PK, both FK cascade, the two supporting indexes, and the partial unique index. Spec §6.1/§6.2. AC-1 (index existence assertion; the DB-rejection test lives in T-025).

tasks.title: Create poi-category Zod 6-file set
tasks.description: Create packages/schemas/src/entities/poi-category/ mirroring attraction/: .schema.ts (PoiCategorySchema: id, slug, nameI18n: I18nTextSchema, translationMeta: TranslationMetaSchema.nullish(), icon?, displayWeight, lifecycle/admin/audit), .crud.schema.ts (PoiCategoryCreateInputSchema/UpdateInputSchema), .query.schema.ts (PoiCategorySearchInputSchema), .http.schema.ts, .access.schema.ts, index.ts. Reuse I18nTextSchema/TranslationMetaSchema from common/i18n.schema.ts. Any zodError.poiCategory... messages must get i18n keys in T-009. Spec §7.2.

subtasks.title: PoiCategorySchema + crud + query + http + access + index

tasks.title: Add category-assignment relation input schemas
tasks.description: Mirror point-of-interest.relations.schema.ts: AssignCategoryToPointOfInterestInputSchema (pointOfInterestId, categoryId, isPrimary?: boolean.default(false)), UnassignCategoryFromPointOfInterestInputSchema (pointOfInterestId, categoryId), SetPrimaryCategoryInputSchema (pointOfInterestId, categoryId). Spec §7.2. zodError keys handled in T-009.

tasks.title: Add additive category filter to PointOfInterestSearchInputSchema
tasks.description: Add optional categoryId and categorySlug filter fields to packages/schemas/src/entities/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.query.schema.ts. Additive only — do NOT remove/alter the existing type filter. Resolved through the join in T-016. Spec §7.2/§6.5.

tasks.title: Add CATEGORY_SLUG_TO_POI_TYPE reverse map + forward map constant
tasks.description: In @repo/schemas (alongside point-of-interest enums), add two exported constants: the §7.4 forward map (legacy type -> category slug, 9 rows) and §7.6 reverse map CATEGORY_SLUG_TO_POI_TYPE (category slug -> PointOfInterestTypeEnum). Reverse derivation must be TOTAL: 9 known slugs map to their enum value, every other slug -> OTHER (provide a deriveTypeFromCategorySlug(slug) helper defaulting to OTHER). Unit test asserting all 9 known mappings + winery/gastronomy/unknown -> OTHER. Spec §7.4/§7.6. Consumed by service (T-012..T-014), seed (T-019), migration (T-020).

tasks.title: Register zodError i18n keys for poi-category + regenerate
tasks.description: For every Zod field carrying {message:'zodError.poiCategory...'} in T-005/T-006, add the key to packages/i18n/src/locales/{es,en,pt}/validation.json (top-level entity under the zodError namespace). Then run npx tsx scripts/extract-zod-keys.ts --verify (GAP-010 guard), pnpm --filter @repo/i18n generate-types, and commit scripts/zod-keys-inventory.json. Guardrail learned in HOS-138.

tasks.title: Add POI_CATEGORY_* PermissionEnum values
tasks.description: Add POI_CATEGORY_CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE/VIEW/RESTORE/HARD_DELETE to packages/schemas/src/enums/permission.enum.ts, mirroring POINT_OF_INTEREST_* naming/value convention, plus a matching PermissionCategoryEnum entry. Assign/unassign/set-primary reuse these (create≈assign, delete≈unassign, update≈set-primary) — no separate manage permission. Spec §7.3/§6.6.

tasks.title: Scaffold PointOfInterestCategoryService (catalog CRUD)
tasks.description: Create packages/service-core/src/services/poi-category/point-of-interest-category.service.ts extending BaseCrudService for poi_categories CRUD (create/update/delete/restore/list/search, 12-method permission-hook shape), gated by POI_CATEGORY_* (T-010). Add model in @repo/db mirroring existing BaseModel-extending models. Naming: PointOfInterestCategoryService (full spelling per §6.4). Unit tests for permission gating.

tasks.title: Implement assignCategoryToPointOfInterest (+ type sync)
tasks.description: assignCategoryToPointOfInterest(actor, {pointOfInterestId, categoryId, isPrimary?}, ctx): create r_poi_category row. If isPrimary:true and a different primary exists, flip it to false in the SAME transaction. When the primary changes, write points_of_interest.type = deriveTypeFromCategorySlug(primaryCategory.slug) in the same tx (§6.5/§7.6). Mirror addPointOfInterestToDestination shape. Spec §6.4. Tests: T-022, T-023.

subtasks.title: Insert join row + demote existing primary in tx
Write derived type on primary change

tasks.title: Implement unassignCategoryFromPointOfInterest (+ auto-promote + type)
tasks.description: unassignCategoryFromPointOfInterest(actor, {pointOfInterestId, categoryId}, ctx): remove the join row. If it was the primary and other category rows remain, auto-promote the next-highest-displayWeight remaining category to primary (OQ-1) and re-derive points_of_interest.type in the same tx. If no rows remain, leave type as-is (never null). Spec §6.4/§6.2/§6.5. Tests: T-022, T-023.

subtasks.title: Auto-promote next by displayWeight when removing primary
Re-derive type in tx; no-op type when empty

tasks.title: Implement setPrimaryCategory (+ type re-derive)
tasks.description: setPrimaryCategory(actor, {pointOfInterestId, categoryId}, ctx): among a POI's already-assigned categories, flip the old primary off and the target on in one transaction, then re-derive points_of_interest.type from the new primary slug (§6.5/§7.6). Reuses POI_CATEGORY_UPDATE. Spec §6.4. Tests: T-022, T-023.

tasks.title: Implement category read-side methods
tasks.description: getCategoriesForPointOfInterest(actor, {pointOfInterestId}, ctx) and getPointsOfInterestForCategory(actor, {categoryId}, ctx), mirroring PointOfInterestService.getPointsOfInterestForDestination/getDestinationsByPointOfInterest. Spec §6.4. Unit tests.

tasks.title: Wire categoryId/categorySlug filter in buildSearchWhere
tasks.description: Resolve the new categoryId/categorySlug filter (T-007) in PointOfInterestService.buildSearchWhere by joining through r_poi_category (like destinationId already does), NOT a column on points_of_interest. Leave the existing type filter branch (lines ~494-504) unchanged. Spec §6.5/§2. Tests: T-024.

tasks.title: Author 40 category fixtures (multilang)
tasks.description: Create 40 fixture files under packages/seed/src/data/poiCategory/*.json, one per dataset category (§2 list). Each: slug, nameI18n {es,en,pt} (es authoritative), curated icon, displayWeight (rough frequency/importance). Deterministic ids. Spec §6.3/§7.5/R-2. Tests: T-026.

tasks.title: Create poiCategories.seed.ts + manifest entry
tasks.description: Create packages/seed/src/required/poiCategories.seed.ts loading the 40 fixtures (idempotent upsert by slug), and add the poiCategories entry to manifest-required.json. Mirror attractions.seed.ts. Spec §7.5.1.

tasks.title: Add 12-POI r_poi_category backfill seed step
tasks.description: Add a relationship-seed step (separate step or extension of pointsOfInterest.seed.ts, mirroring attractions relationship seed) creating one r_poi_category row per the 12 existing POIs using §7.4 legacy-type -> category-slug mapping, each isPrimary=true. Also ensure each POI's points_of_interest.type equals deriveTypeFromCategorySlug(primary slug) so baseline stays consistent (§6.5). Spec §6.3/§7.5.1. Tests: T-026.

tasks.title: Create data-migration 0012-hos-139-poi-categories
tasks.description: Create packages/seed/src/data-migrations/0012-hos-139-poi-categories.ts (0012 verified next-free vs origin/staging 2026-07-13; last is 0011-hos-138 — RE-CHECK before PR). Idempotent: insert 40 categories (skip existing slug) + 12 r_poi_category backfill rows (skip existing POI-category pair) + set derived type on those 12 POIs. Ledgered in seed_migrations. Spec §7.5.2. Tests: T-026.

tasks.title: Add poiCategory glob to check-seed-dual-write.sh
tasks.description: Add the new poiCategory data path glob to scripts/check-seed-dual-write.sh's path list so the dual-write CI guard covers this new entity. Spec §7.5.3.

tasks.title: Service tests: primary demote (AC-5) + auto-promote (AC-6)
tasks.description: Unit tests: assignCategoryToPointOfInterest with isPrimary:true demotes the pre-existing primary (exactly one primary remains) — AC-5; unassign of current primary with others remaining promotes next-highest-displayWeight — AC-6. Also cover setPrimaryCategory single-primary invariant. ≥90% coverage on the primary-management logic.

tasks.title: type-sync tests (AC-8 a/b)
tasks.description: Tests asserting points_of_interest.type equals §7.6 mapping after assign(isPrimary)/setPrimary/unassign-auto-promote (AC-8a), and that a primary category with no enum equivalent (e.g. winery) derives type=OTHER (AC-8b). Uses deriveTypeFromCategorySlug.

subtasks.title: type equals mapping after each op

tasks.title: Category filter service test (AC-7)
tasks.description: Service-level test: PointOfInterestSearchInputSchema categoryId/categorySlug filter returns only POIs joined to that category via r_poi_category, using at least two POIs in different categories. Assert the type filter still works independently.

tasks.title: Partial unique index rejection test (AC-1)
tasks.description: DB-level test that inserts a second r_poi_category row with isPrimary=true for the same pointOfInterestId and asserts the database rejects it (partial unique index). Complements T-004's existence assertion.

tasks.title: Seed backfill test (AC-4)
tasks.description: Test that all 12 existing seeded POIs have exactly one r_poi_category row marked isPrimary=true matching §7.4, on both a fresh build (baseline seed) and a pre-existing seeded DB run through the 0012 data-migration. Assert type equals the derived value for each.

tasks.title: Consumer regression test (AC-8c)
tasks.description: Regression test asserting the existing type-keyed consumers (PointOfInterestService type filter, apps/web poi-labels.ts, DestinationPOISection.astro badge) are unchanged in code and still work given a synced type value. Confirms the sync keeps type a valid populated enum (never null / invalid).

subtasks.title: poi-labels.ts unchanged behavior with synced type

tasks.title: Quality gate + migration prefix re-check
tasks.description: Run pnpm typecheck; full suites pnpm --filter @repo/db test, --filter @repo/schemas test, --filter @repo/service-core test, --filter @repo/seed test (NOT scoped); test:integration (separate command); check-seed-dual-write.sh; extract-zod-keys --verify; i18n generate-types clean. RE-CHECK structural (0053) and data-migration (0012) prefixes are still free vs origin/staging immediately before opening the PR (a parallel PR may have taken them — this broke HOS-138 in CI). Fix any red before PR. Spec §12.7.

subtasks.title: typecheck + all touched package suites + integration
